name: com.ezg.quickoutline
description: Per-object outline/silhouette effect for 3D meshes. Add the QuickOutline component to any GameObject to render a colored outline using a two-pass mask + fill material, with adjustable color, width, and visibility mode (OutlineAll, OutlineVisible, OutlineHidden, OutlineAndSilhouette, SilhouetteOnly). Based on Chris Nolet's Quick Outline.
